name: Fetch daily YouTube videos from top AI automators and log them to Google Sheets
description:
This automation runs daily to fetch the latest videos on Youtube from leading AI automators, such as:

Nate Herk
Nick Saraev
Jack Roberts
Cole Medin
Nick Puru
Ed Hill
Jason Cooperson
Manthan Patel
Nick Daily Updates

This can be a great asset for keeping up with daily updates and new strategies in the field of AI automation, especially when combined with my "YT Video Analyzer" workflow, which is designed to intelligently analyze each of these newly retrieved videos.

You can find the "YT Video Analyzer" workflow template in my profile.
